title: rubus diversifolius
intro: Rubus diversifolius, also known as the diverse-leaf bramble or diverse-leaved thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus diversifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. Rubus diversifolius is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to utilize its medicinal properties.
